text: The Company shall make payment of USD 50,000 within 30 days, provided that the Client has accepted delivery.
In no event shall either party be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of this Agreement.

recommendations.CONCEPT_LIABILITY_PRESENT: The agreement contains provisions addressing limitation of liability.
recommendations.CONCEPT_LIABILITY_FAIRNESS: Waiver of indirect or consequential damages is present, establishing standard commercial protection.
recommendations.CONCEPT_LIABILITY_RISK: The agreement contains liability provisions but lacks a clear aggregate liability cap, exposing parties to unlimited liability.

text: The Vendor shall indemnify the Client against all liabilities, losses, and claims arising out of or relating to this Agreement.

recommendations.CONCEPT_INDEMNIFICATION_PRESENT: The agreement contains provisions addressing indemnification.
recommendations.CONCEPT_INDEMNIFICATION_RISK: The agreement contains broad/unlimited indemnification obligations (e.g., 'any and all claims'), which increases risk.
